full_text:
Xu Gong 許貢
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Gong (許貢). Prefect of Wu Territory. Executed by Sun Ce for having relations with Cao Cao. Xu Gong was affiliated with Liu Yao, Yan Baihu, Wang Lang, and the Wu Kingdom. Xu Gong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
